name: Steady-State Walk
description: A single continuous walk at a comfortable-to-brisk pace. Start easy, settle into a steady moderate effort, and finish with an easy cool-down. Outdoors or on the treadmill.
source: Researcher-composed steady-state cardio routine using the equipment_exercises walking entries. Warm-up/cool-down structure per general physical-activity guidance.

name: Low-Impact Machine Cardio
description: A joint-friendly steady cardio session on the machine of your choice. Pick ONE: treadmill walk, stationary bike, e-bike, or light rowing. Keep effort to a conversational pace and build duration over time.

exercises.note: Option B: stationary bike, ~30 min (pick one machine)
Option C: e-bike ride, ~30 min (pick one machine)
Option D: light rowing, ~20 min (pick one machine)

source: Researcher-composed freestyle low-impact cardio routine using the equipment_exercises machine entries. Pick a single machine; durations per general steady-state guidance.

name: Rowing Intervals (Light)
description: Gentle interval session on the rowing machine at LIGHT resistance: alternate slightly faster strokes with easy recovery rowing. Warm up and cool down with easy rowing. Keep the spine neutral and drive with the legs.

exercises.note: 60s slightly faster stroke, then 60s easy recovery row. Repeat 6 rounds. Light resistance, legs-first drive, neutral back. Add ~3 min easy rowing before and after as warm-up/cool-down.

source: Researcher-composed light interval routine using rowing-machine-steady. Light resistance and leg-drive/neutral-spine cues per general indoor-rowing guidance and owner's light-resistance preference.

name: Resistance Band Full-Body
description: A beginner-friendly full-body resistance-band circuit. Complete 2-3 rounds of the sequence, resting about 45-60 seconds between rounds. Use a band tension that lets you keep good form for all reps.

exercises.note: Hip hinge - hips back, flat back

source: Researcher-composed full-body band circuit using the equipment_exercises band entries. Rep/round structure (2-3 rounds, 10-15 reps) per general beginner resistance-band programming guidance.

name: Resistance Band Lower-Body
description: A focused lower-body and glute band routine. Complete 3 rounds, resting about 45-60 seconds between rounds.

exercises.note: Hip hinge - hips back, flat back
Reused bodyweight calf raises from exercises.json to round out the lower-body session

source: Researcher-composed lower-body band routine using the equipment_exercises band entries plus the existing bodyweight 'calf-raises'. Rep/round structure per general beginner resistance-band programming guidance.
